warnings: Matched leaf route at location /copilot does not have an element or Component (x2)

diagnosis.root_cause: Etap returns HTTP 200 with correct text/event-stream headers but sends NO SSE event data in the body. Response is delivered as complete (non-streaming) empty body.
diagnosis.comparison_with_161: Identical behavior. No-GOAWAY (Strategy D) did not change the core SSE streaming issue.
diagnosis.no_goaway_effect: No ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR observed (GOAWAY suppression working), but SSE body is still empty.
fix_needed: Send actual SSE events in the response body: data: {json}\n\n format
Must stream SSE events as chunked transfer, not deliver as complete response
Warning text should be in SSE event data field

notes: Strategy D (no-GOAWAY) confirmed working — no connection errors. But the fundamental issue remains: Etap's SSE response contains no event data. The client waits indefinitely for SSE events that never arrive.
